verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They journeyed far, a weary pair, They sought for shelter from the cold night air. Some place where she could lay her head, Where she could give her Babe a quiet bed. Was there no room? No corner there? In all the town a spot someone could spare? Was there no soul come to their aid? A stable bare was where the family stayed.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Do you have room for the Savior, and do you seek Him a-new? Have you a place for the One who lived and died for you? Are you as humble as a shepherd boy, or as wise as men of old? Would you have come that night? Would you have sought the light? Do you have room?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A star a-rose, a wondrous light, a sign from God this was the Holy night. And yet so few would go to see the Babe who came to rescue you and me. This Child Divine is now a King. The gift of life to all the world He brings, And all mankind He saves from doom, But on that night for him there was no room.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Will you come tonight? Will you seek the light? Do you have room?
